projectDescription: A local-first desktop markdown editor for folders of plain-text notes, docs, and personal wikis, built with Tauri, React, and Rust.
keyFeatures: Local-first plain-text editing — all files stay on disk in standard Markdown format
Rich Markdown rendering with tables, task lists, Mermaid diagrams, and wiki-links
CSS-var-driven theming with per-mode light/dark presets and live customization
Gitignore-aware workspace sidebar with fuzzy file search
Multi-window support — one workspace per window, focus existing windows on re-open
Tab system with per-tab navigation history (back/forward) and session restore
Custom find-and-replace overlay with literal case-insensitive search
macOS-native: signed and notarized DMG release with in-app auto-updater
Shell command integration — install `writer` CLI to open files from the terminal
YAML frontmatter panel with live editing and automatic title inference
publicApiSurface: Tauri IPC: read_directory, read_file, write_file, create_file, create_directory, rename_entry, delete_entry, file_exists, reveal_in_file_manager
Tauri IPC: open_workspace, open_workspace_in_new_window, restore_workspace, get_recent_workspaces, remove_recent_workspace, take_pending_open, save_session, load_session
Tauri IPC: get_settings, get_setting, set_setting, reset_setting
writer CLI: writer <folder> — open a folder in the desktop app
writer CLI: writer <file.md> — open a specific markdown file
